narrative:
Olmsted Township-00-I (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,105 registered voters, with 59.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 13.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 27.1%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 13.7 percentage points.
